pageContext.name: Monkey D. Luffy
pageContext.description: Bringing two-dimensional characters to three-dimensional life in a 1:9 scale slightly larger than the 'standard' 1:12, the IMAGINATION WORKS series harnesses fine sculpting and detailed coloring to capture the ultimate essence of popular characters. The third release is Monkey D. Luffy from ONE PIECE!  Collect this anime figure today!
